items.stem: Which of the following is a property of metals?
What is the basic unit of all living things?
Which part of the plant cell is NOT found in an animal cell?
Water evaporates from the ocean and forms clouds. What happens next in the water cycle?
Which sequence correctly shows the life cycle of a butterfly?
A farmer notices his maize plants are growing poorly and have yellow leaves. What is the most likely cause?
options: The plants have too much water
The seeds were planted too deep

items.stem: A goat farmer wants to improve the health of his animals. Which practice is most important?
options: Keeping animals in a small space
Giving animals clean water and vaccinations
Letting animals find their own food

items.stem: Which organ pumps blood around the human body?
What causes day and night on Earth?
options: The Moon moves around the Earth
The Earth moves around the Sun
The Earth spins on its own axis
The Sun moves across the sky

items.stem: In a food chain: Grass → Grasshopper → Frog → Snake. If all frogs disappeared, what would most likely happen?
options: Grasshoppers would decrease and snakes would increase
Grasshoppers would increase and snakes would decrease
Grass would decrease and snakes would increase

items.stem: A student observes that crops grow better next to a river than on a hilltop. She wants to find out why. Which is the best way to test her idea?
options: Ask a farmer for their opinion
Grow the same crop in both locations and measure the growth
Read about farming in a book
Grow different crops in each location

items.stem: Which of the following is a source of renewable energy?
A light bulb does not light up when connected to a battery. What is the most likely reason?
options: The bulb has too much energy

items.stem: When a mobile phone is charging, what energy conversion is taking place?
A student measures the temperature of water heated by a fire and records data every minute. She notices the temperature increases slowly at first, then faster. What is the best explanation?
options: Water absorbs heat faster as it gets warmer
The energy from the fire is being transferred to the water

items.stem: What is the best way to deal with plastic waste in a community?
options: Bury it in the school compound

items.stem: Malaria is common in many parts of Ghana. Two students argue about how to prevent it. Ama says: 'Sleep under a mosquito net.' Kofi says: 'Drain stagnant water near homes.' Who is correct?
options: Both are correct — they address different parts of the problem

items.stem: A community cuts down trees to plant more crops. Over the next few years, the area receives less rainfall. A scientist says the deforestation caused this. What evidence would best support the scientist's claim?
options: A record showing rainfall decreased after deforestation started
The number of crops grown each year
